title: The Echoing Photograph
idea: A person finds an old, antique photograph in a thrift store. When they look closely, they notice a faint figure in the background that wasn't there before. As the days pass, the figure in the photograph becomes clearer and seems to move closer to the foreground. The person starts hearing faint whispers and seeing shadows in their peripheral vision, mirroring the changes in the photograph. The climax reveals the figure has somehow 'copied' itself into the viewer's reality, and the last shot is of the person's reflection in a mirror, with the spectral figure standing directly behind them, smiling. The final sound is a gasp.
targetAudience: Young adults and teens interested in supernatural horror and creepy mysteries.
